prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.0L EA888 Gen 3 (CCTA/CDNC) with a Garrett GTX3071R turbocharger, upgraded BorgWarner K04 internals, and a custom 3-inch downpipe with a Vibrant GESI 100-cell catalytic converter for optimized spool and flow

Full forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83mm, 9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance, paired with an ARP Custom Age 625+ head stud kit and ACL Race Series bearings for 30+ psi boost capability

Custom ECU calibration via APR Stage 3+ software with a Cobb Accessport V3 for real-time monitoring, utilizing a Bosch 0280158892 high-flow fuel pump, Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines for crankcase ventilation

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, spherical bearing top mounts, and custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) for aggressive cornering, paired with H&R 25mm front and 22mm rear anti-roll bars with poly bushings

Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers with 355mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, matched with Brembo 4-piston rear calipers and 330mm rotors for consistent stopping power under high-speed track use
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Parati-specific) with custom carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a duckbill rear spoiler, featuring integrated OEM-style LED turn signals and a 50mm extended wheelbase for aggressive stance

Custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof, mirrors, and lower body cladding, paired with a full de-chrome treatment including blacked-out VW badges, window trim, and a custom carbon fiber front grille insert

Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +22 front and 17x10.5 +30 rear wheels in a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear) with custom fender flares for clearance, and a set of OZ Racing Ultraleggera center caps

Custom interior overhaul featuring Recaro Pole Position seats with custom Alcantara and red stitching, a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a full roll cage from Custom Cages UK with bolt-in door bars and a harness bar for track safety
